content:
Sagittarius June 2026 Horoscope and Crystal of the Month

Energy Theme Shift and transition — partnership fresh start, then Jupiter enters your fellow fire sign
Key Dates New Moon Jun 14 (Gemini, 7th house) / Full Moon Jun 29 (Capricorn, 2nd house) / Jupiter enters Leo Jun 29
Love The 7th house New Moon is your biggest relationship fresh start of the year
Career Jupiter in fellow-fire Leo opens a year of expansion and confidence
Crystal of the Month Sunstone
Lucky Colors Deep purple, royal blue, warm gold
Lucky Number 3
Affirmation I let the fire be shared; the right partnership fans the flame.

This Month’s Energy

Sagittarius, June 2026 begins with relationship, ends with expansion. The Super New Moon in Gemini on June 14 falls in your 7th house of partnership — your biggest relationship doorway of the year. Chiron enters Taurus on June 19 (your 6th house), beginning an 8-year healing chapter around work, routine, and body. The Capricorn Full Moon on June 29 lights up your 2nd house of money and self-worth, and the same day Jupiter — your ruling planet — enters fellow-fire Leo (your 9th house), opening a 12-month chapter of belief expansion, long-distance travel, publishing, and study. Mercury turning retrograde in Cancer (your 8th house) on June 29 means shared finances need reworking. June’s job is to commit to a relationship early, then let the year open your view.

Key Dates for Sagittarius in June 2026

Date Transit Meaning for Sagittarius Do / Avoid
Jun 14 Super New Moon in Gemini 7th house — fresh start in partnership; a new relationship, a deeper commitment, or a clean slate with an existing partner Do: name the relationship truth, make the commitment, date with intent
Avoid: keeping options open out of fear
Jun 19 Chiron enters Taurus 6th house — 8-year healing of work-wounds, routine-wounds, body-wounds; the daily-grind patterns you’ve carried surface Do: revise the routine, get bodywork, name the work-wound
Avoid: pushing through burnout
Jun 29 Capricorn Full Moon + Jupiter enters Leo + Mercury Rx 2nd house money climax + 12-month belief expansion opens; shared-finances conversations scramble Do: declare the year’s belief or study intention, document money agreements
Avoid: signing new shared-finance deals during Mercury Rx
Jun 4 Venus enters Taurus 6th house Venus — love of routine, work-mates, body-care as romance Do: beautify the workspace, date a colleague (carefully), commit to the body practice
Avoid: neglecting the body for the mind
Jun 9 Mars enters Virgo 10th house Mars — career pace spikes; visibility, leadership, ambition activated Do: claim the role, make the ask, network upward
Avoid: conflict with authority figures
Jun 21 Sun enters Cancer 8th house season — intimacy, shared finances, psychological depth through July Do: restructure joint finances, name the deeper truth, allow vulnerability
Avoid: controlling what needs to be released

Career & Money

The Capricorn Full Moon on June 29 falls in your 2nd house of money and self-worth — a climax around income, a financial chapter, or a worth-wound. Many Sagittarians will see a long effort around money pay off, or finally name a fair price for their work. Combined with Mars in Virgo (your 10th house of career) from June 9, ambition runs hot this month — claim the role, make the ask.

Then on June 29, Jupiter — your ruling planet — enters Leo, your 9th house, beginning a 12-month chapter of belief expansion, long-distance travel, publishing, and study. Sagittarius thrives when the view widens, and this is your year for exactly that. The catch: Mercury turns retrograde in Cancer (your 8th house of shared finances) the same day. Close pending shared-money deals before June 27; avoid signing new loans, investments, or business partnerships between June 29 and July 23 without review. Crystals for wealth can support the mindset; the practical move is patient documentation.

Love & Relationships

The Super New Moon in Gemini on June 14 falls in your 7th house of partnership — your biggest relationship doorway of the year. For coupled Sagittarians, this is the moment to renew or deepen the commitment. For single Sagittarians, an important person may enter your life — be willing to date with intent rather than keeping options perpetually open. Sagittarius fears being tied down; June rewards the one willing to choose.

Venus in Taurus (your 6th house) from June 4 brings love of routine — a workmate crush, a body-care practice that becomes a love language. With Chiron entering Taurus on June 19, work-wounds and body-wounds surface for healing. Crystals for love can support the opening; the deeper practice is letting the partnership heal the work-burnout pattern.

Health & Wellness

Chiron entering Taurus on June 19 begins an 8-year healing chapter in your 6th house of routine, work, and body. The daily-grind patterns you’ve carried — overwork, burnout, body neglect, the work-wounds from past jobs — surface to be reworked. June is the doorway. Begin the body practice, revise the routine, name the work-wound.

Venus in your 6th house from June 4 supports body-care as romance — beauty in the daily, ritual in the routine. Mars entering Virgo on June 9 (your 10th house) can stress the nervous system around career ambition; notice it. Sunstone, your crystal of the month, keeps the fire steady without burnout. This is lifestyle guidance, not medical advice; persistent concerns belong with a clinician.

Crystal of the Month: Sunstone

Why Sunstone fits Sagittarius this month. You are Jupiter-ruled, and on June 29 your ruling planet enters fellow-fire Leo — the year’s biggest expansion moment for you. Sunstone, traditionally tied to solar warmth, leadership, and confident visibility, is the stone that helps you receive Jupiter’s gift without scattering it. Where Citrine would push and Moonstone would cool, Sunstone keeps the fire steady and bright — exactly what a 7th-house commitment and a 9th-house expansion require.

How to use it during June 2026. Carry Sunstone in your pocket from June 14 (the 7th-house New Moon) through August. Hold it in your receiving hand on June 29 (Jupiter enters Leo) for 10 minutes of breathing with the stone over your upper chest.

Best date to use it: June 29, the day Jupiter enters fellow-fire Leo — Sunstone over your heart during a 10-minute practice, naming the year’s belief or study expansion.

Read more: Sunstone Meaning and Best Crystals for Sagittarius.

Monthly Crystal Ritual for Sagittarius — June 2026

When: June 14, the Super New Moon in Gemini (your 7th house).
Crystal: Sunstone.
Intention: Open the partnership chapter with full presence; let the fire be shared.

  1. Cleanse Sunstone in direct sunlight for 15 minutes on the morning of June 14.
  2. Set the intention on the 7th house theme: write down one truth you’ve withheld from a partner (current or future) — and the conversation you’ll have within 14 days.
  3. Act by having the conversation before Jupiter enters Leo on June 29. Sunstone in your pocket during the talk.
  4. Reflect at the Capricorn Full Moon on June 29: what opened in partnership, and what belief does it ask of the year ahead? Carry Sunstone during the review.

Shop Sagittarius Crystals for June 2026

Want to build your monthly crystal toolkit? Explore the full Sagittarius crystal guide for stones connected with expansion, truth, travel, and optimism — including the Sunstone that anchors your luckiest year-expansion in 12. Every stone is genuine, ethically sourced, and real — not dyed, not glass.

Frequently Asked Questions — Sagittarius June 2026

Is June 2026 a good month for Sagittarius?

Yes — one of the year’s best. The Gemini New Moon on June 14 is your biggest relationship doorway. Then Jupiter (your ruling planet) enters fellow-fire Leo on June 29, opening a year of expansion. Mercury Rx that day is the only catch.

How will the Gemini New Moon on June 14 affect Sagittarius love life?

It falls in your 7th house of partnership — your biggest relationship doorway of the year. Name the commitment, date with intent, don’t keep options open out of fear.

What does Jupiter entering Leo mean for Sagittarius?

Jupiter is your ruling planet; entering fellow-fire Leo begins a 12-month chapter of belief expansion, long-distance travel, publishing, and study. Sagittarius thrives when the view widens, and this is your year for exactly that.

What is the best crystal for Sagittarius in June 2026?

Sunstone — it keeps your fire steady and bright, matched to your ruling planet entering fellow-fire Leo. Carry it from June 14 through August. See the full Sagittarius crystal guide →

How does Chiron entering Taurus affect Sagittarius health?

Chiron in your 6th house begins an 8-year healing of work-wounds, routine-wounds, and body-wounds. The burnout and overwork patterns you’ve carried surface to be reworked — not punished.

Should Sagittarius sign a financial agreement in late June 2026?

Not advised. Mercury turns retrograde in your 8th house of shared finances on June 29. Any major shared-money decision (loan, investment, business partnership) made June 27–July 23 will likely need rework. Close what’s already in motion; delay new commitments.
